chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Civil Revision Application No. 79 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on office objection as at A 2.For hearing of CMA No.2587/2021 3.For hearing of main case 20.01.2026 None present ---------- On last date of hearing, a cautionary note was passed that if none appeared on behalf of the applicant, no further adjournment will be granted. Today, none present for the applicant. No intimation is received. In view of the previous order passed by this Court, this revision is dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
